text: There's a payment arrangement on the account with a pending payment of $$session.params.api.billingProfile.ptpAmount to be paid by $session.params.api.billingProfile.playAccountBalanceDates.playptpPaymentDate via $session.params.ptpPaymentMethod.

Il y a un arrangement de paiement sur le compte avec un paiement en attente de $$session.params.api.billingProfile.ptpAmount à payer avant le $session.params.api.billingProfile.playAccountBalanceDates.playptpPaymentDate via $session.params.ptpPaymentMethodFR.
